news.t: AllianzIM to Transfer Exchange Listings and Fund Name Changes
AllianzIM Expands Lineup of U.S. Large Cap Buffered ETFs

overview.description: The AllianzIM U.S. Equity Buffer10 Nov ETF (NVBT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust index. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust over a specific holdings period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral NVBT was launched on Oct 31, 2022 and is issued by Allianz.

data.text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Allianz Investment Management LLC (AllianzIM), a subsidiary of Allianz Life Insurance Company of North America and adviser to the AllianzIM exchange-traded funds (ETFs), ...

data.title: AllianzIM Expands Lineup of U.S. Large Cap Buffered ETFs
data.text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AllianzIM announced today it is launching its monthly series of U.S. Large Cap Buffered ETFs suite, starting with new November funds.
